name: Almond Nougat
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first four ingredients in a heavy saucepan.
2. Cook, stirring, until the sugar is dissolved. Continue cooking without stirring until a small amount of the mixture dropped into cold water forms a hard ball (250°F).
3. Beat egg whites in a large bowl of an electric mixer until stiff but not dry.
4. Gradually beat in about one-fourth (not more) of the syrup, and continue beating until the mixture holds its shape.
5. Cook the remaining syrup until a small amount of the mixture separates into hard and brittle threads when dropped into cold water (300°F).
6. Gradually beat the remaining syrup into the first mixture and continue beating until the mixture begins to hold its shape.
7. Add the flavoring and food coloring to tint a delicate shade. Beat in the butter; continue beating until very thick and satiny.
8. Stir in the nuts and cherries.
9. Press into a buttered 8x8x2-inch pan, smoothing the top.
10. Let stand until firm.
11. Turn out of the pan and cut into 1 1/2-inch by 1-inch pieces.
12. Wrap each piece individually in waxed paper.
For best flavor, store several days in a cool place before serving.
